install.note: After install, run 'openfang init' to configure provider and model.

configure.note: OpenFang uses ~/.openfang/config.toml (TOML format). Supports 27 providers, 123+ models.
steps: 2. Under [llm] section, set api_key, model, and base_url
3. base_url must end with /v1 for OpenAI-compatible providers
configure.merge_script:
python3 -c "import json,sys,os; c=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); b=c.get('baseUrl',''); b=b+'/v1' if b and not b.endswith('/v1') else b; f=open(os.path.expanduser('~/.openfang/config.toml'),'w'); f.write('[llm]
api_key = "'+c['apiKey']+'"
model = "'+c['modelId']+'"
base_url = "'+b+'"
temperature = 0.7
'); f.close()"

common_pitfalls: TOML format: values must be quoted with double quotes
API base URL must end with /v1
OpenFang supports migration from OpenClaw: 'openfang migrate --from openclaw'
